hooks.command: payload=$(cat); if printf '%s' "$payload" | grep -Eq '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*git[[:space:]]+add[[:space:]]+(-A|--all|\.)([[:space:]]|")'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"git add -A/--all/. is banned by CLAUDE.md - stage specific files explicitly."}}'; fi

b=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$b" = "main" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct commits to main are blocked by git-policy.md - create a feature branch first."}}'; fi
